reviews.comment:
Antes era Buenisima , ahora un desastre, solo que a los sanguches les ponen mas fiambre, pero no es la sombra de lo que era!

It used to be great, now it's a disaster. They just put more cold cuts in the sandwiches, but it's not even a shadow of what it used to be!
